description_long: This is a clear plastic bottle with a light green label, featuring the Arizona Green Tea branding and cherry blossom graphics. The bottle is cylindrical with a slightly tapered neck and a white screw cap. The label wraps around the entire bottle, displaying nutritional information, branding, and decorative elements. The bottle is partially filled with a light yellow-green liquid, visible through the transparent plastic. The cap and label both have a pastel color palette, with the label including text and floral illustrations. The bottle is placed on a rectangular, slightly worn wooden or cardboard surface.
description: A clear plastic Arizona Green Tea bottle with a light green label, white screw cap, and visible yellow-green liquid inside. The label features cherry blossom graphics and branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Arizona Green Tea branding, cherry blossom graphics, and a clear view of the liquid inside.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the nutritional facts and product information on the label, with the cap and back of the bottle visible.
description_view_2: Side view highlighting the vertical Arizona text and partial cherry blossom graphics, with the bottle's cylindrical shape evident.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the 'Green Tea' text and more cherry blossom graphics, with the cap and label details visible.
attribute_label_or_branding: Arizona Green Tea branding with cherry blossom graphics, nutritional facts, and product information in pastel colors on a light green label wrapping the bottle.
